name: @stackra/pipeline
purpose: Laravel-style middleware pipeline — fluent send/through/then API, DI integration, and Hub presets for named pipelines.
capabilities: Hub presets for named, reusable pipelines
when_to_use: Composing an ordered chain of middleware around a value (HTTP request, action, event, ...).
when_not_to_use: For simple function composition use plain reduce; for event fan-out use @stackra/events.
